summary: This is a brief promotional post announcing two media appearances to discuss 'Weapons of Math Destruction.' O'Neil will appear on the Brian Lehrer Show on WNYC radio and later that evening will have a conversation with journalist Felix Salmon at a Barnes & Noble location in Manhattan. The post provides practical details for listeners and attendees.
key_points: Appearing on Brian Lehrer Show on WNYC around 11:15am
Evening event at Barnes & Noble (86th and Lexington) with Felix Salmon at 7pm
Both events focused on discussing Weapons of Math Destruction
key_insight: A simple event announcement with no substantive content to analyze.
